2606.12281.title: CCKS: Consensus-based Communication and Knowledge Sharing
2606.12281.paper_summary: In Decentralized Training and Decentralized Execution (DTDE) for cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL), action-advising-based knowledge sharing promotes interpretable and scalable cooperation among agents. However, current action advising approaches often adhere too much to the teacher's guidance without evaluating teacher-student compatibility, which causes excessive advising, suboptimal stability, and degraded performance. To overcome these challenges, this paper presents a Consensus-based Communication and Knowledge Sharing (CCKS) framework, which allows agents to adopt recommendations based on consensus-derived constraints and to follow the teacher's instructions more smartly. This mechanism enables agents to balance exploration and learning from experienced teachers, improving overall performance. The key is the consensus model construction, for which we propose to employ contrastive learning to construct consensus models based on local observations in the agents' training phase. In action selection, agents score and choose actions based on consensus and shared knowledge. Designed as a plug-and-play solution, CCKS integrates seamlessly with existing DTDE algorithms. Experiments conducted in the Google Research Football environment and the complex StarCraft II Multi-Agent Challenge demonstrate that the integration with CCKS significantly improves cooperation efficiency, learning speed, and overall performance compared with current DTDE baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/yuanxpy/CCKS.
2606.12281.paper_summary_zh: 在合作式多智能體強化學習（MARL）的去中心化訓練和去中心化執行（DTDE）中，基於行動建議的知識分享促進了智能體之間可解釋且可擴展的合作。<lb/>然而，目前的行動建議方法往往過於依賴教師的指導，而未評估教師與學生的相容性，這導致了過度建議、次優穩定性和性能下降。<lb/>為了克服這些挑戰，本文提出了一個基於共識的通信和知識分享（CCKS）框架，該框架允許智能體根據共識導出的約束來採納建議，並更智能地遵循教師的指示。<lb/>這一機制使智能體能夠在探索與向經驗豐富的教師學習之間取得平衡，從而提高整體性能。<lb/>關鍵在於共識模型的構建，為此我們提議利用對比學習來根據智能體訓練階段的局部觀察構建共識模型。<lb/>在行動選擇中，智能體根據共識和共享知識對行動進行評分和選擇。<lb/>CCKS被設計為即插即用的解決方案，與現有的DTDE算法無縫整合。<lb/>在Google Research Football環境和複雜的StarCraft II多智能體挑戰中進行的實驗表明，與CCKS的整合顯著提高了合作效率、學習速度和整體性能，與目前的DTDE基準相比更是如此。<lb/>代碼可在 https://github.com/yuanxpy/CCKS 獲得。
2606.12281.author: Jinyuan Zu et.al.
2606.12281.authors: Jinyuan Zu, Xiaowei Lv, Yongcai Wang, Deying Li, Yunjun Han, Wenping Chen, Fengyi Zhang, Naiqi Wu
